verification_gate: Red tests reproduce the strict-link failure cascade; every generated report remains schema-valid; absent identities are represented without fabricated None values; LPS-007 and LPS-008 summaries match blocked structured results; the task-status projection exposes proof invalidation; after ARCHBP-033 passes, rerun restores pass only from new evidence while ledger history remains append-only.

gate_result.red_first: red suite committed at lifeos a6cf45a (4/5 failing): blocked-summary contradiction on LPS-007 and LPS-008, fabricated-None identity interpolation, blocked-proof shape, and evidence-only recovery; green at 7dfe3fe (5/5)
gate_result.cascade_evidence: fixtures corrupt the shipped authority integrity and MVP bundle reports (result=fail, absent verifier_authority) and drive the real gate functions through the failure path against a copied spine tree
gate_result.summary_evidence: LPS-007 and LPS-008 summaries are condition-aware: a blocked gate is narrated as blocked with its failing structured checks named; the pass narration is unreachable while any structured check fails
gate_result.identity_evidence: absent executor/verifier identities render as 'an undeclared executor/verifier'; the red test asserts the literal string None never appears in any summary
gate_result.report_evidence: blocked proof records keep the lifeos-planning-spine.proof-record.v0 shape (status blocked, structured gate_result, clean summary) and JSON round-trip exactly; pass-state bytes are unchanged so no shipped proof record churned
gate_result.invalidation_evidence: update-task-graph-status's projection carries invalidated_task_ids, asserted empty in the healthy corpus by test_proof_corrections and exposed whenever a proof invalidates
gate_result.recovery_evidence: restoring the shipped authority report to pass flips the gate back to pass with the positive summary; the ledger merge path remains append-only (merge-proof-records appends, never rewrites — proven by the ledger conflict suites)
gate_result.full_suite: test_failure_state_reconciliation 5/5; test_proof_corrections, test_proof_ledger_conflicts, test_reproducible_generation all OK; verify-lps-docs 12/12 gates pass
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: the tests execute the real verify-lps-docs gate functions against real fixture trees copied from the live spine

proof_summary: ARCHBP-034 is complete: the failure-state behavior of the projection stack is reconciled. Red-first fixtures (lifeos a6cf45a) reproduce the strict-link failure cascade by corrupting the shipped authority-integrity and MVP-bundle reports, exposing two genuine defects: LPS-007 and LPS-008 narrated a pass while their structured results were blocked, and absent verifier/executor identities were interpolated as fabricated None values. The green fix (7dfe3fe) makes both summaries condition-aware — blocked gates name their failing structured checks and identity absences render as 'undeclared' — while blocked proof records stay schema-shaped, the task-status projection continues to expose proof invalidation, recovery to pass happens only from new shipped evidence, and the ledger stays append-only. Failure suite 5/5 with every existing gate green and zero churn of shipped pass-state proofs.
